description: A mining engineer designs the main decline (a spiral tunnel) that will serve as the primary access for trucks and equipment into a new underground mine.

nodes.task_description: Define the starting point of the decline on the surface (the portal) and the target endpoint deep in the orebody.

expected_outcome.value: The start and end points of the decline are set.

nodes.task_description: Use a design tool to automatically generate an optimal decline alignment between the two points, respecting constraints like maximum gradient and minimum turning radius.

expected_outcome.value: An optimized 3D alignment for the decline is generated.

nodes.task_description: Finalize the design, including the dimensions of the tunnel and the locations for passing bays and service cutouts.

expected_outcome.value: A complete, practical design for the main access decline is created.
